ENCRYPTION.setup-description: Protect your student data with secure PIN-based encryption. This PIN will be used across all your devices.
ENCRYPTION.confirm-description: Enter your PIN again to confirm
ENCRYPTION.setup-complete: Encryption has been successfully set up. Your student names will now be securely encrypted.
ENCRYPTION.pin-mismatch: The entered PINs do not match. Please try again.
ENCRYPTION.setup-failed: Encryption could not be set up. Please try again.
ENCRYPTION.note-privacy: All student names are stored encrypted - never in plain text
ENCRYPTION.note-security: Your PIN is used for key derivation with state-of-the-art cryptography
ENCRYPTION.note-sharing: You can securely share encrypted classes with other teachers
ENCRYPTION.skip-warning: WARNING: Without encryption, student names will be stored unprotected. This is not privacy compliant!
ENCRYPTION.unlock-description: Enter your PIN to access encrypted data
ENCRYPTION.unlock-failed: Failed to unlock encryption. Please check your PIN.
